title: Capacity NSX — Onde colocar próximos clientes

panels.title: 📊 Sumário executivo — onde colocar próximos clientes?
🎯 Quanto cabe HOJE em cada candidato (TESP7 fora — está saturado)

targets.query:
import "math"

sites_re = /^(TESP2|TESP3|TESP5|TESP6)$/

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ sites_re)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ sites_re)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

join(tables: {a: per_ind, b: t1_per_site}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - r.atual_t1 else 0.0)}))
  |> group(columns: ["site"])
  |> min(column: "cp")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["cp"], desc: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["site","cp"])
  |> rename(columns: {cp: "_value", site: "_field"})

panels.title: 🔥 Heatmap: Saturação % de cada indicador AO ATINGIR o T1 Alvo (por site)

targets.query:
import "math"
import "experimental"

sat_tesp2 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "TESP2")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_tesp2 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "TESP2")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

at1_tesp2 = if exists t1_tesp2._value and t1_tesp2._value > 0.0 then t1_tesp2._value else 1.0
dt1_tesp2 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp2}) - at1_tesp2

row_tesp2 = sat_tesp2
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with sat: math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / at1_tesp2) * dt1_tesp2) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","sat"])
  |> rename(columns: {sat: "_value"})

sat_tesp3 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "TESP3")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

at1_tesp3 = if exists t1_tesp3._value and t1_tesp3._value > 0.0 then t1_tesp3._value else 1.0
dt1_tesp3 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp3}) - at1_tesp3

sat_tesp7 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)

  |> last()

t1_tesp7 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)

union(tables: [row_tesp2, row_tesp3, row_tesp5, row_tesp6, row_tesp7])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site"], columnKey: ["display_name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["site"])

import "math"

site = "TESP2"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp2})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1 else 0.0)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","cp"])
  |> min(column: "cp")
  |> rename(columns: {cp: "_value", site: "_field"})

panels.title: Indicador que mais limita em TESP2

import "math"

site = "TESP2"

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1 else 0.0)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","cp"])
  |> sort(columns: ["cp"], desc: false)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> rename(columns: {display_name: "_value", site: "_field"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_value","_field"])

panels.title: Maior saturação % AO atingir T1 Alvo em TESP2

targets.query:
import "math"

site = "TESP2"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp2})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with sat: math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","sat"])
  |> max(column: "sat")
  |> rename(columns: {sat: "_value", site: "_field"})

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "TESP2")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {site: "_field"})

import "math"

site = "TESP2"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp2})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","display_name","current_usage","max_supported"])

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         por_cliente:        math.round(x: r.current_usage / atual_t1 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         projecao:           math.round(x: (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         numero_final:       math.round(x: r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         saturacao_pct:      math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         sobra:              math.round(x: r.max_supported - (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1)),
         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         display_name:       "Indicador",
         max_supported:      "Limite NSX",
         current_usage:      "Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção (até alvo)",
         numero_final:       "Final ao atingir alvo",
         saturacao_pct:      "Saturação ao alvo (%)",
         sobra:              "Sobra ao alvo",
         max_clientes:       "Max clientes (este limite)",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis (deste limite)",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["Saturação ao alvo (%)"], desc: true)

import "math"

site = "TESP3"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp3})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")

  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1 else 0.0)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","cp"])
  |> min(column: "cp")
  |> rename(columns: {cp: "_value", site: "_field"})

panels.title: Maior saturação % AO atingir T1 Alvo em TESP3

targets.query:
import "math"

site = "TESP3"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp3})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with sat: math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","sat"])
  |> max(column: "sat")
  |> rename(columns: {sat: "_value", site: "_field"})

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "TESP3")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {site: "_field"})

import "math"

site = "TESP3"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp3})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","display_name","current_usage","max_supported"])

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         por_cliente:        math.round(x: r.current_usage / atual_t1 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         projecao:           math.round(x: (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         numero_final:       math.round(x: r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         saturacao_pct:      math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         sobra:              math.round(x: r.max_supported - (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1)),
         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         display_name:       "Indicador",
         max_supported:      "Limite NSX",
         current_usage:      "Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção (até alvo)",
         numero_final:       "Final ao atingir alvo",
         saturacao_pct:      "Saturação ao alvo (%)",
         sobra:              "Sobra ao alvo",
         max_clientes:       "Max clientes (este limite)",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis (deste limite)",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["Saturação ao alvo (%)"], desc: true)

         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         display_name:       "Indicador",
         max_supported:      "Limite NSX",
         current_usage:      "Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção (até alvo)",
         numero_final:       "Final ao atingir alvo",
         saturacao_pct:      "Saturação ao alvo (%)",
         sobra:              "Sobra ao alvo",
         max_clientes:       "Max clientes (este limite)",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis (deste limite)",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["Saturação ao alvo (%)"], desc: true)

import "math"

site = "TESP7"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp7})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1 else 0.0)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","cp"])
  |> min(column: "cp")
  |> rename(columns: {cp: "_value", site: "_field"})

panels.title: Indicador que mais limita em TESP7

targets.query:
import "math"

site = "TESP7"

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1 else 0.0)}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","cp"])
  |> sort(columns: ["cp"], desc: false)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> rename(columns: {display_name: "_value", site: "_field"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_value","_field"])

panels.title: Maior saturação % AO atingir T1 Alvo em TESP7

targets.query:
import "math"

site = "TESP7"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp7})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with sat: math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","sat"])
  |> max(column: "sat")
  |> rename(columns: {sat: "_value", site: "_field"})

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "TESP7")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {site: "_field"})

import "math"

site = "TESP7"
alvo_t1 = float(v: ${alvo_tesp7})

per_ind = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","display_name","current_usage","max_supported"])

t1_now_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == site)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

atual_t1 = if exists t1_now_raw._value and t1_now_raw._value > 0.0 then t1_now_raw._value else 1.0
delta_t1 = alvo_t1 - atual_t1

per_ind
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         por_cliente:        math.round(x: r.current_usage / atual_t1 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         projecao:           math.round(x: (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         numero_final:       math.round(x: r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1),
         saturacao_pct:      math.round(x: (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1) / r.max_supported * 100.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
         sobra:              math.round(x: r.max_supported - (r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / atual_t1) * delta_t1)),
         max_clientes:       (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","saturacao_pct","sobra","max_clientes","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         display_name:       "Indicador",
         max_supported:      "Limite NSX",
         current_usage:      "Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção (até alvo)",
         numero_final:       "Final ao atingir alvo",
         saturacao_pct:      "Saturação ao alvo (%)",
         sobra:              "Sobra ao alvo",
         max_clientes:       "Max clientes (este limite)",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis (deste limite)",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["Saturação ao alvo (%)"], desc: true)
